Estimated formaldehyde disposed of could be artificially high as used historic formaldehyde concentrations Change in estimated isopropyl alcohol created and released are due to the facility burning less hog fuel during 2015 than during previous years. comments.comment: Higher than usual opacity was observed during September 2015 as a result of an impaired RB4 electrostatic precipitator. Stack tests during this time period confirmed this. TRA quantity created is based on quantity discharged and a removal efficiency. Because quantity discharge increased, and the assumed removal efficiency was not adjusted, the amount created is artificially high. This equipment has been fixed and 2016 emissions were adjusted appropriately.
